name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Gov. John Kasich will join Colorado Gov. John Hickenlooper on
CNN's 'Anderson Cooper 360' at 8PM ET on Monday for a joint
discussion about the bipartisan work they're doing to provide
guidance on the healthcare debate

Peter, to all the dads out
there, our team is wishing you an enjoyable and memorable Happy
Father's Day!

Upcoming Interview: Gov. John
Kasich will join Colorado Gov. John Hickenlooper on CNN's
'Anderson Cooper 360' at 8PM ET on Monday for a joint discussion
about the bipartisan work they're doing to provide guidance on
the healthcare debate.

The Latest News:

Gov. Kasich has been working with
a bi-partisan group of governors to find a balanced and
sustainable approach to health care reform. This week, he joined
six other governors - Democrats and Republicans - in sending a
letter to Senate leadership to lay out some key principles to
restore stability to our nation's health insurance system.

Throughout his career, Gov.
Kasich learned that meaningful change is best approached by
finding common ground in a bipartisan fashion. A true and lasting
fix of our health care dilemma must be accomplished in a way that
brings us together, not by replacing one divisive wedge with
another.

Read More: Washington Post:
Distinguished Pols of the Week

Also last week, in recognition of
the work Gov. Kasich has done to lift up our most vulnerable
citizens - especially the drug addicted, mentally ill and
working-poor, Gov. Kasich was inducted into the Ohio Hospital
Association's Hall of Fame.

In case you missed the exciting
news, Gov. Kasich joined UnitedHealth Group in Dublin, OH last
week to announce their plans to bring 700 jobs to central Ohio!
Watch a short video from the event (here).

Thank you for your support.

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: The people who draw the maps
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a17/24c69fd9/dbb65f38/18e79489/216327163/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE622N_digital_email_20170618_Gerrymander_inact&source=WQEFE622N_digital_email_20170618_Gerrymander_inact")
---

| | Peter,

Here's some real talk that may surprise you:

Republicans don't hold a majority in the House because they're more popular. They have a majority because they've distorted congressional districts to make SURE they win.

They carve up states into bizarrely shaped districts to contain Democratic voters and make districts easier for Republicans to win. This process, called gerrymandering, has resulted in more Republicans winning seats in Congress and state legislatures. Once elected, they pass a bunch of laws that make it harder to vote, further blocking Democratic-leaning voters from electing officials who _actually_ share their values.

This entire situation is fundamentally undemocratic. But here's the good news: After 2020, states get to redraw these districts, and this time, we can help make sure our votes are protected.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will put a stop to GOP gerrymandering and restore the rights of Democratic voters.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a17/24c69fd9/dbb65f38/18e7948a/216327163/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170618_email_Gerrymander?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFE622N_digital_email_20170618_Gerrymander_inact&source=WQEFE622N_digital_email_20170618_Gerrymander_inact")**

Here's why electing pro-choice Democratic women NOW is important: If we make gains in state legislatures and governors' offices in 2018, those are the folks who will be sitting at the tables that draw district maps in 2020.

The GOP only got this leg up in the first place because they won so many races in 2010. They quickly got to work making sure that they'd hold their majorities for the next decade, and it's been an uphill climb for Democratic candidates ever since.

Stopping anti-choice, anti-woman, and anti-family legislation doesn't just mean backing the right candidates. We also have to fix the lopsided field that makes it easier for Republicans to win and disempowers Democratic voters at the same time.

NOW is the time to get to work.

**Donate $3 to elect pro-choice Democratic women as state legislators and governors so they can put a stop to the GOP's manipulation of our democracy:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Stop-Gerrymandering](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a17/24c69fd9/dbb65f38/18e7948b/216327163/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170618_email_Gerrymander?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStopGerrymanderi&utm_campaign=WQEFE622N_digital_email_20170618_Gerrymander_inact&source=WQEFE622N_digital_email_20170618_Gerrymander_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7a17/24c69fd9/dbb65f38/18e79485/216327163/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170618_email_Gerrymander?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE622N_digital_email_20170618_Gerrymander_inact&source=WQEFE622N_digital_email_20170618_Gerrymander_inact")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---

name: DemocraticSenate@maggiehassan.com
subject: top secret: GOP health care bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde9c/2a380d31/1b0a14ee/fe941e/403200023/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde9c/2a380d31/1b0a14ee/fe941e/403200023/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
_" Will there be any hearings for the GOP health care bill?"_
If it seems like a reasonable question about a bill that will impact tens of millions of people, that's because it is.
**But Republican men in the Senate are working on the bill behind closed doors -- no women, and no Democrats, allowed.**
When Senator Claire McCaskill asked the Republican Chairman of the Senate Finance Committee a very simple question -- whether they'll hold a hearing on the Trumpcare proposal before it comes to a vote in the Senate and whether they'll get a chance to question experts, the answer was simple. **No.**
Claire kept pushing, and she's going to KEEP pushing to protect access to affordable health care. But if you can believe it, Washington Republicans used this moment to launch sexist attacks against Claire, saying that she's "ranting and raving."
**Claire is facing a tough re-election, and with access to affordable health care on the line, we need to make sure that we keep her in the Senate.**
[**Claire has a big FEC fundraising deadline at the end of the month, and needs our help -- can you please give $3 or more now to re-elect Claire and thank her for her persistence in the fight to protect access to affordable health care?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde9c/2a380d31/1b0a14ee/fe941f/403200023/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA2X213aDRjbWMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTcwNjE4X213aDRjbWNyc19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201706_mwh4cmc?refcode=20170618_mwh4cmcrs_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Paul Ryan
subject: Happy Father's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

Having a family has been the most fulfilling thing I've experienced.

As a dad, I want to wish all the other dads out there a happy Father's Day.

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=Mjk0MzMwNjMS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MjI4MjExMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Paul Ryan

Paid for by Ryan for Congress, Inc.
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. name: Karen Handel
subject: I just recorded this for you Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Handel for Congress, Inc
body:
With this election only days away, I need you to please take a moment and listen to this right away. | | [ **LISTEN TO MY URGENT CAMPAIGN UPDATE >>>** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42860503:s-369S2wN:m:1:1857329133:5985611664D6918120290D91D28B4A08:r)
---

Friend,

I just took a pause from campaigning to record this urgent message for you about the Georgia Special Election.

With this election only days away, **[I need you to please take a moment and listen to it right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42860503:s-369S2wN:m:1:1857329133:5985611664D6918120290D91D28B4A08:r)**

| [ **LISTEN TO MY URGENT CAMPAIGN UPDATE >>>** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42860503:s-369S2wN:m:1:1857329133:5985611664D6918120290D91D28B4A08:r)
---

All eyes are on Georgia and what happens here next week. I need your help to ensure we are able to defeat the national Democrat machine and win on June 20th.

I cannot win unless I have your support.

**[The video I recorded is not very long and will only take one minute for you to watch. I hope you will do so right away and afterwards stand with our campaign in these critical final days.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42860503:s-369S2wN:m:1:1857329133:5985611664D6918120290D91D28B4A08:r)**

Thank you,

Karen Handel

name: Jill Donnelly
subject: Wish Joe a Happy Father's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c260b/7377f838/3679b36b/51fb666b/2756116788/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

As our children and I celebrate Father's Day with Joe, we hope all dads enjoy this special day -- and we hope your family also has a great Father's Day.

I know you support Joe because he never stops working for Hoosiers, because he's focused on keeping good-paying jobs in Indiana, and because he fights to protect our healthcare.

Joe's not only a U.S. senator -- he's also a loving father and husband. We worked together to raise our two kids, Molly and Joe, Jr., and he has always been supportive of their hopes and dreams. Along the way, he helped our children and other children in our community as a coach and as a member of the school board at their high school.

Joe brings that caring nature to his work every day as he stands up for working families across the state. He wants to make sure that every Hoosier's future is bright. I know that he'll never stop fighting for the same reason I know he's a great father: his unwavering dedication to a better future for everyone.

Today, Joe is one of millions of dads who we celebrate. [**Will you join me in wishing Joe a Happy Father's Day and sign our Father's Day card? It will be the best gift we can send him.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c260b/7377f838/3679b36b/51fb666a/2756116788/VEsE/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/wish-joe-a-happy-father-s-day")

Thanks for caring for Joe, Indiana, and our country.

Jill Donnelly **** **** **** **** | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c260b/7377f838/3679b36b/51fb6665/2756116788/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170618&amount=25")
---
**** ****
**** ****

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c260b/7377f838/3679b36b/51fb6664/2756116788/VEsC/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")
clean_body: | "" | | Peter, As our children and I celebrate Father's Day with Joe, we hope all dads enjoy this special day -- and we hope your family also has a great Father's Day. I know you support Joe because he never stops working for Hoosiers, because he's focused on keeping good-paying jobs in Indiana, and because he fights to protect our healthcare. Joe's not only a U.S. senator -- he's also a loving father and husband. We worked together to raise our two kids, Molly and Joe, Jr., and he has always been supportive of their hopes and dreams. Along the way, he helped our children and other children in our community as a coach and as a member of the school board at their high school. Joe brings that caring nature to his work every day as he stands up for working families across the state. He wants to make sure that every Hoosier's future is bright. I know that he'll never stop fighting for the same reason I know he's a great father: his unwavering dedication to a better future for everyone. Today, Joe is one of millions of dads who we celebrate. "" Thanks for caring for Joe, Indiana, and our country. Jill Donnelly ** | "" ** | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206 ""

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Republican legislative leaders are getting ready to unveil their budget. Now they will show us what their priorities really are.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c55/2fde7c66/42b407ac/15697c8d/483004123/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-budget?utm_campaign=em17_170616_budget_adv_gq___rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170616_budget_adv_gq___rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends,

Republican legislative leaders are getting ready to unveil their budget tomorrow.

We've seen budgets from both the House and Senate, but now they will show us what's in their final budget -- and really, what their priorities are.

I showed you my priorities in my own budget.

My plan includes critical investments in education, health care, economic development and public safety. With the right priorities, North Carolina can become a top ten educated state, with healthier and safer communities, and growing middle class paychecks.

And we can do it all without raising taxes or fees.

**[These goals don't come with party labels -- they're common sense priorities that will make North Carolina best in the nation. If you're with me, add your name here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c55/2fde7c66/42b407ac/15697c8d/483004123/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-budget?utm_campaign=em17_170616_budget_adv_gq___rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170616_budget_adv_gq___rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

We can make our voices heard when we stand together and let our Republican legislative leaders know what we want and expect out of our state government.

I hope you'll stand with me as I work to build a North Carolina that works for everyone.

Sincerely,

Roy
| | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c55/2fde7c66/42b407ac/15697c8d/483004123/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-budget?utm_campaign=em17_170616_budget_adv_gq___rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170616_budget_adv_gq___rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
